com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.cardreader

Interface CardReader

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface CardReader
extends Module
    Provides the ability to search for mag card, contact card and contactless card at the same time.

    How to get this module:

         CardReader cardReader = (CardReader)NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.CARD_READER);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void cancelCardReader()
      Cancels card reader.
      boolean checkCardSlotStatus(ContactCardSlot cardSlot)
      Checks if there is a card inserted in target card slot.
      void closeRf()
      Close Rf.
      CardType getLastReaderType()
      Gets the card type that obtained by openCardReader(com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardType[], int, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderParameters, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderListener) method last time.
      boolean isCardInserted()
      Deprecated. 
      This interface can be replaced by checkCardSlotStatus(ContactCardSlot).
      boolean isCardPresent()
      Checks if there is a contactless card presented.
      boolean isCardPresent(ContactlessCardType[] cardTypes)
      Checks if there is a target contactless card presented.
      void openCardReader(CardType[] cardTypes, int timeout, CardReaderParameters cardReaderParameters, CardReaderListener cardReaderListener)
      Opens card readers and waits for cards.
      void openRf()
      Initialize and open Rf.

    • Method Detail

      • openCardReader

        void openCardReader(CardType[] cardTypes,
                    int timeout,
                    CardReaderParameters cardReaderParameters,
                    CardReaderListener cardReaderListener)
             throws NSDKException
        Opens card readers and waits for cards.

        It will only return the first card that swiped/inserted/tapped and stop waiting for other cards.

        Example:

             CardType[] cardTypes = new CardType[]{CardType.CONTACT_CARD, CardType.CONTACTLESS_CARD, CardType.MAG_CARD};
     int timeout = 30;
     CardReaderParameters parameters = new CardReaderParameters();
     // If nothing is set to parameters, default values for parameters will be applied.
     // If you need to specify parameters, set as below according to your needs.
     parameters.setContactlessCardTypes(new ContactlessCardType[]{ContactlessCardType.TYPE_A, ContactlessCardType.TYPE_F});
     parameters.setVerifyTrack(false);

     CardReaderListener cardReaderListener = new CardReaderListener(){
         @Override
         public void onTimeout() {
             // Handle timeout
         }

         @Override
         public void onCancel() {
             // Handle cancel
         }

         @Override
         public void onError(int code, String message) {
             // Handle error
         }

         @Override
         public void onFindMagCard(MagCardInfo magCardInfo) {
             // Mag card swiped. Handle mag card info.
         }

         @Override
         public void onFindContactCard() {
              // Contact card inserted. New different contact card instances according to your needs.
              // For example, new a CPU card:
              CPUContactCard cpuContactCard = new CPUContactCardImpl(ContactCardSlot.IC1);
              // If you can power up the card successfully, that means you have newed a correct card instance for the inserted card.
              try {
                  cpuContactCard.powerUp();
              } catch(NSDKException e) {
                  // This could happen in two cases:
                  // 1. The inserted card is CPU card, but error occurred when powering up the card.
                  // 2. The card is not a CPU card.
              }
         }

         @Override
         public void onFindContactlessCard(ContactlessCardType cardType, ContactlessCardInfo cardInfo) {
            // Contactless card tapped. New different contactless card instances according to the tapped card type and your needs.
            if (cardType == ContactlessCardType.TYPE_A) {
                CPUContactlessCard cpuContactlessCard = new CPUContactlessCardImpl();
                // If you can activate the card successfully, that means you have newed a correct card instance for the tapped card.
                try {
                    cpuContactlessCard.activate();
                } catch(NSDKException e) {
                    // This could happen in two cases:
                    // 1. The tapped card is CPU Type A card, but error occurred when activating the card.
                    // 2. The card is not a CPU Type A card.
                }
            } else if (cardType == ContactlessCardType.TYPE_F) {
                // Handle card info
            }
         }
     };

     try{
         cardReader.openCardReader(cardTypes, timeout, parameters, cardReaderListener);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }
        Parameters:
        cardTypes - [Required] Expected card types. See CardType
        timeout - [Required] Timeout for waiting cards, shall be >0. Unit: seconds.
        cardReaderParameters - [Optional] Card reader parameters. See CardReaderParameters.
        • When contactless card is expected, target contactless card types are required. If no contactless card types set, it will search for type A and type B cards by default.
        • When mag card is expected:
          • It will verify track data by default.
          • Default length of first clear part of masked PAN: 6.
          • Default length of last clear part of masked PAN: 4.
        • When contact card in IC2 slot is expected, CardReaderParameters.cardSlots will include ContactCardSlot.IC2
        cardReaderListener - [Required] Listener which will be called to give the result. See CardReaderListener. If ContactCardSlot.IC2 is expected, this shall be ExtendedCardReaderListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • cancelCardReader

        void cancelCardReader()
               throws NSDKException
        Cancels card reader.

        If it is searching cards, this will trigger CardReaderListener.onCancel() callback of openCardReader(com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardType[], int, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderParameters, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderListener) method. Otherwise, this will only close card reader.

        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getLastReaderType

        CardType getLastReaderType()
                    throws NSDKException
        Gets the card type that obtained by openCardReader(com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardType[], int, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderParameters, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderListener) method last time.

        It is null if openCardReader(com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardType[], int, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderParameters, com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderListener) method has not been called.

        Returns:
        Card type, see CardType
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • isCardPresent

        boolean isCardPresent()
               throws NSDKException
        Checks if there is a contactless card presented.
        Returns:
        If there is a contactless card presented.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • isCardPresent

        boolean isCardPresent(ContactlessCardType[] cardTypes)
               throws NSDKException
        Checks if there is a target contactless card presented.
        Parameters:
        cardTypes - [Required] The contactless card types to be checked, see ContactlessCardType.
        Returns:
        If there is a target contactless card presented.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • isCardInserted

        boolean isCardInserted()
                throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. This interface can be replaced by checkCardSlotStatus(ContactCardSlot).
        Checks if there is a card inserted in ContactCardSlot.IC1.
        Returns:
        If there is a card inserted.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • checkCardSlotStatus

        boolean checkCardSlotStatus(ContactCardSlot cardSlot)
                     throws NSDKException
        Checks if there is a card inserted in target card slot.
        Parameters:
        cardSlot - [Required] The target card slot to be checked, which could only be ContactCardSlot.IC1 or ContactCardSlot.IC2.
        Returns:
        If there is a card inserted in target card slot.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • openRf

        void openRf()
     throws NSDKException
        Initialize and open Rf.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • closeRf

        void closeRf()
      throws NSDKException
        Close Rf.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
